# BEVDriver

## 📝 Description  
We introduce: BEVDriver, an LLM-based motion planner using bird-eye-view maps for high level maneuver planning and waypoint prediction, following natural language instructions.

## 📄 Paper
For a detailed explanation, please refer to our scientific paper:  
📄 **[BEVDriver: Leveraging BEV Maps in LLMs for Robust Closed-Loop Driving]** – [Read it here](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.03074)
